annotator_1.text: Flowcean is a framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning that focuses on modularity and usability.

annotator_1.text: Flowcean offers various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics.

annotator_1.text: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture.

annotator_1.text: Flowcean streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation, making it more efficient and accessible.
